description: CompositionDark grey trousers made of 100% cotton with a washed look, that has a flat front, two pockets on the sides, two patch pockets on the back with buttoned flaps, looped waist with appliqued brand tab on a loop, red stitch detailing and a button and zipper closureFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jackets and accessories, these trousers from probase are made of cotton fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40 cmHeight: 6.2', Waist: 32"
